default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and future directions.](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressive 42% week-over-week increase in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - Imubit ranking \#1 for strategic keywords like "cement plant operational efficiency"
  - [New focus on AI Operating System (AIOS) for Industrial Plants as a key concept](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate opinion pieces and thought leadership content into strategy](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [42% week-over-week increase in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [CTR currently low (expected for new content), but average position improving (from 26 to 25)](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - Ranking \#1 for strategic keywords:
      - ["cement plant operational efficiency" (50 monthly searches, 6 visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - ["cement fuel optimization"](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - ["smelter optimization" (50 monthly searches)](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - "Advanced process control" ranking \#31 (4,900 monthly searches)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [7 articles published this week, 7 more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Focus on industry-specific topics (cement, manufacturing)](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Workforce development content cluster performing well (plant operator training, manufacturing skills gap)](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Considering opinion pieces and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Planning "50 industrial AI stats for 2026" piece for September launch](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### New Strategic Direction: AI Operating System (AIOS)

  - [Tim introduced concept of AIOS for Industrial Plants](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Aims to differentiate Imubit in the evolving AI landscape](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Incorporates all plant data (process, communications, documents) for holistic learning](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Potential to transform plant control, predictions, and forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Collaboration and Content Development

  - [Discussed creating opinion pieces based on executive insights](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Plan to involve Gil (likely CEO) in next meeting to discuss new pitch and future direction](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Considering transition to more user-friendly CMS (e.g., Webflow) for easier content management](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Research keywords and topics around AIOS concept](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Prepare for extended next meeting (1 hour) to include Gil's input on future direction](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Mariana to provide top 3 CMS recommendations for potential website transition](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Continue focus on strategic keywords while incorporating new AIOS messaging](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Develop opinion pieces and thought leadership content to establish authority](https://fathom.video/share/qhYQ_j1QvsyzNSuXfM6-8M9tsd_jKJ_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

action_items.description: Arrange for Gil to join next meeting for 20-25 mins to discuss new pitch and future direction
Get top CMS recommendations from engineering/managing editors team, considering security & publishing needs
